metadata.title: We Have Taken Everything, And Everything Has Been Taken From Us
metadata.artist: And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun
tracklist: 01 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - Most Of Us Have Never Known Light
02 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - The Ground Morphs Into Our Feet Morphs Into The Ground
03 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - This Is Eternal
04 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - Those Who Fall As They Walk Are The Most Fortunate
05 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - We Are Failure
06 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - All That We See Is Unspeakable
07 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - We Have Taken Everything, And Everything Has Been Taken From Us
08 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - All We Leave Behind Is Our Sorrow
